_meta.description: Storm descent schedule. Storm consumes one region every ~3.5 min. No Sudden Death. Anyone not in Core Hollow by 17:30 dies. Timings LOCKED; damage values TBD.
_meta.status: TIMINGS LOCKED — damage first-pass balanced, REDUCED 2026-07-06 (all TBD)
_meta._balanced: 2026-07-05 first-pass balance pass — testable values pending playtesting
_meta._tbd: 2026-07-06: ALL per-phase damage_per_second reduced >=50% (storm was too punishing). Atmosphere barely noticeable (0.2), escalating, Core Hollow dangerous but NOT instantly lethal (20.0 dps = ~5s TTK for an unarmored 100-HP player; longer with the buffed armor). Still placeholder / TBD pending playtest, NOT locked final.
_meta._balance_note: Per-phase damage_per_second is an escalating curve, forgiving early -> dangerous late. WIRED 2026-07-06: StormSystem._current_storm_dps() now reads these per-phase values (indexed by the authoritative elapsed-time phase index) instead of the old single flat storm_dps in world_config.json. The flat storm_dps (12.0) remains only as a null-safety fallback if this per-phase data is ever missing.
